description:
# Create a Shopify Account

A **Shopify Account** record links one Shopify store to one Nexus Company. Each store gets its own record.

Before creating, make sure you have:

- Your **Shop URL** (e.g. `mystore.myshopify.com`).
- The **Nexus Company** this store belongs to.
- Either a **Static Token** (legacy `shpat_…` Admin API token) **or** an **OAuth 2.0 Client ID + Client Secret** from the Shopify Dev Dashboard.

Click the action button to open a fresh Shopify Account form.
name: Create Shopify Account
title: Create a Shopify Account
